steps.title: Find the largest gap
steps.content: The phrase most remarkably calls for the most dramatic difference in the table. Game & Watch has the highest sales at about 18.6 million units, while ColecoVision has the lowest at about 2 million units.

steps.title: Reject smaller contrasts
steps.content: Choice A compares systems only about one million units apart. Choice B incorrectly assigns 18.6 million units to MSX. Choice C compares two systems in the lower sales range, also only about one million units apart. The answer is D.
